title: Fix live app stuck on 'Loading profile' screen

requirements.text: In `frontend/src/App.tsx`, investigate and fix the logic that causes the app to hang indefinitely on the 'Loading profile' screen after the 'Connecting to backend' step. After the actor/backend connection is confirmed, the app must proceed to either the Dashboard, ProfileSetup, or an error screen within a bounded time. Add a timeout guard (e.g., 10–15 seconds) around the profile-loading phase so that if `getUserProfile` or equivalent query does not resolve, the app transitions to an actionable error or retry state rather than hanging forever.

quotes: live app is stucked on Loading profile

acceptanceCriteria: The app never hangs indefinitely on 'Loading profile' — it either loads successfully or shows an error/retry UI within a bounded timeout.
If the profile query times out or errors, the user sees a clear message with a retry option.
If the profile query succeeds, the app navigates to Dashboard or ProfileSetup as appropriate.
The timeout value is sourced from `frontend/src/lib/startupTimings.ts` or a new constant defined there.

requirements.text: In `frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts`, ensure the `useGetCallerUserProfile` (or equivalent profile-fetching query) is configured with an explicit `staleTime`, `retry` limit (e.g., max 2 retries), and a `queryFn` timeout so that a slow or unresponsive backend call does not cause indefinite loading. The query must reject/fail gracefully if the backend does not respond within a reasonable window (e.g., 10 seconds).

quotes: live app is stucked on Loading profile

acceptanceCriteria: The profile query has an explicit retry limit (≤ 2 retries) so it does not loop indefinitely.
The profile query has a timeout so it fails fast if the backend is unresponsive.
A failed profile query surfaces an error state in App.tsx rather than keeping the loading spinner active.

requirements.text: In `backend/main.mo`, ensure the `getUserProfile` (or equivalent profile retrieval) function does not block indefinitely or throw an unhandled error for the principal `hrxqg-aty7r-ze5hr-pldpb-ool7h-fy2rn-npy5t-lvtmr-lccbl-bdj53-pae`. If the principal is not yet registered, the function must return a typed result (e.g., `#err(#NotFound)`) rather than trapping or hanging, so the frontend can handle the 'no profile yet' case and route to ProfileSetup.

quotes: live app is stucked on Loading profile

acceptanceCriteria: Calling `getUserProfile` for an unregistered principal returns a typed error result (e.g., `#err(#NotFound)`) without trapping.
The hardcoded admin principal `hrxqg-aty7r-ze5hr-pldpb-ool7h-fy2rn-npy5t-lvtmr-lccbl-bdj53-pae` does not cause the function to hang or throw.
The frontend correctly interprets a `#NotFound` profile response as 'navigate to ProfileSetup'.

requirements.text: In `frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx`, ensure that if the user already has a profile on the backend (i.e., the profile query returned data), the ProfileSetup component is not rendered and the user is redirected to the Dashboard. Add a guard in `App.tsx` so the routing logic does not incorrectly send a user with an existing profile to ProfileSetup, which could cause a circular loading loop.

quotes: live app is stucked on Loading profile

acceptanceCriteria: A user with an existing profile is never shown the ProfileSetup screen.
After profile data resolves successfully, the app routes directly to Dashboard.
There is no circular redirect between 'Loading profile' → ProfileSetup → 'Loading profile'.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
All backend changes must remain within the single-actor pattern in backend/main.mo.
nonGoals: Redesigning the full authentication or startup flow beyond fixing the profile-loading hang.
Changing the Internet Identity integration or AuthClient logic.
Adding new backend data models or endpoints unrelated to profile loading.
